TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_item TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_item.
tt_marc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_marc.
tt_mat_desc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mat_desc.
tt_mat_doc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mat_doc.
* tt_purchasing TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_purchasing.
tt_j_1ig_subcon TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_j_1ig_subcon.
tt_konp TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_konp.
tt_conditions TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_conditions.
tt_vbrk TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_vbrk,
tt_konv TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_konv,
tt_final TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_final.
tt_purchasing TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_purchasing.
tt_mseg TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_mseg.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: KNUMV FROM VBRK INTO TABLE IT_VBRK
KWERT FROM PRCD_ELEMENTS INTO TABLE IT_KONV
READ TABLE GT_J_1IG_SUBCON INTO DATA(GS_J_1IG_SUBCON) WITH KEY
READ TABLE GT_MAT_DOC INTO DATA(GS_MAT_DOC) WITH KEY MBLNR = GS_J_1IG_SUBCON-MBLNR
READ TABLE IT_VBRK INTO WA_VBRK WITH KEY VBELN = WA_FINAL-VBELN.
* READ TABLE LT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 1.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
* CONCATENATE lv_mat_text WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO Lv_mat_text SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE .
LOOP AT IT_KONV INTO WA_KONV WHERE KNUMV = WA_VBRK-KNUMV AND KPOSN = WA_FINAL-POSNR.
READ TABLE GT_ITEM INTO LS_ITEM INDEX 1.
READ TABLE GT_MAT_DOC INTO GS_MAT_DOC INDEX 1.
IF GS_MAT_DOC1-LGORT+0(1) NE 'K' AND GS_MAT_DOC1-LGORT NE
SELECT SINGLE LGORT FROM EKPO INTO @DATA(LGORT)
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR FROM TWLAD INTO @DATA(WA_TWLAD)
SELECT SINGLE STREET, CITY1, POST_CODE1 FROM ADRC
READ TABLE IT_FINAL INTO WA_FINAL INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE VKBUR FROM VBAK INTO @DATA(LV_VKBUR)
SELECT SINGLE BEZEI FROM TVKBT INTO LV_BRANCH
* PERFORM get_text USING objname 'VBBK' 'Z038' 'E' CHANGING gv_text_LD.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LV_LINES INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z038' name = LV_TEXTNAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBK' 'Z039' 'E' CHANGING GV_TEXT_TAG.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'VBBK' 'Z999' 'E' CHANGING GV_TEXT_TPI.
PERFORM GET_TEXT USING OBJNAME 'MATERIAL' 'GRUN' 'S' CHANGING GV_TEXT_NOTE.
LT_STB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF STPOX,
SELECT SINGLE MENGE FROM EKPO INTO GV_MENGE1 WHERE EBELN = GS_PURCHASING-EBELN.
SELECT SINGLE MENGE FROM EKPO INTO GV_MENGE1 WHERE EBELN = GS_PURCHASING-EBELN.
DATA: LT_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE,
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z888' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** CONCATENATE GV_MAT_TEXT WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_MAT_TEXT SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONDENSE LV_LINES.CONCATENATE GV_MAT_TEXT lv_lines INTO GV_MAT_TEXT SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
SHIFT GV_MAT_TEXT LEFT DELETING LEADING space.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_LINES LV_LINES INTO GV_LINES SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** CONCATENATE GV_LINES LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO GV_LINES SEPARATED BY space .
** CONCATENATE GV_LINES LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO GV_LINES SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
lo_text_reader->READ_TEXT_STRING_S( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = LV_NAME object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
DATA : IT_XKOMV TYPE KOMV OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE.
CALL FUNCTION 'CALCULATE_TAX_ITEM' "This is tHe Function Module
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z888' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE GV_COMM LV_LINES INTO GV_COMM SEPARATED BY SPACE.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z041' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
SELECT SINGLE BKTXT FROM MKPF INTO GV_BKTXT
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0002' name = lv_name object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines4 ).
SELECT SINGLE * FROM KNA1 INTO WA_KNA1
SELECT SINGLE * FROM LFM1 INTO WA_LFM1
*lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id ='ST' name = 'ZCONS' object = 'TEXT' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
READ TABLE GT_PURCHASING INTO GS_PURCHASING INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR FROM TWLAD INTO @WA_TWLAD
SELECT SINGLE STREET, CITY1, POST_CODE1 FROM ADRC
* CONCATENATE LV_CONS wa_lines-tdline INTO LV_CONS SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
LV_ADD1 = 'B Cube Building, Bavdhan, Opp. Bavdhan Police Station, Pune - 411021'.
LV_ADD2 = '8, Dhanashree Apartments, Survey No. 133/1-2, Off ITI Road, Aundh, Pune 411007(INDIA)'.
LV_ADD3 = 'Row House No.101&102,Survey No. 54/3/4, Near Nikhil Garden, Wadgaon Budruk Pune 411041 (India)'.

FORMS.FPCLINE: FORM get_text USING objname TYPE tdobname
DATA : text_lines TYPE TABLE OF tline,
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = txt_id name = objname object = obj_typ IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
